overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired market street in Night City. The environment features traditional red paper lanterns mixed with cyberpunk neon signage, scattered debris, food stalls, and distinctive characters, showcasing the game's blend of old and new architectural styles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with dining tables and litter

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market passage, passing picnic tables and scattered trash

notable_agents.action: standing near the picnic tables as the player approaches

entered.detail: metal and glass overhead structure providing partial cover
white tables with blue bench seats arranged along the right side
traditional red Chinese lanterns hanging from overhead structures
illuminated signage on distant buildings including Japanese characters
purple booth with anime character advertisement visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered market walkway littered with trash. Picnic tables line the right side while red paper lanterns hang overhead. A purple vending kiosk becomes visible in the distance as the player moves forward through the semi-covered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to food stall area

events.description: passing the purple vending kiosk and approaching the food stall with striped awning

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway, moving past the purple kiosk toward a food vendor area

entered.detail: wooden food stall with black and white striped awning and illuminated menu displays
elevated walkway connecting buildings overhead with glass panels
teal colored wall with red 'TYGER CLAWS' graffiti and Japanese text

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the purple vending kiosk and approaches a food stall with a striped awning. The environment features overhead pedestrian bridges and a teal wall with Tyger Claws gang graffiti becomes visible on the left as the walkway continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market intersection with magazine stand

events.description: turning corner from covered walkway into open street area with parked motorcycle

agents.ego_description: walking past the food stall and magazine stand, then turning right into a more open area with parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: person with red hair and white face mask standing near the food stall
person standing in the open area near a parked motorcycle

entered.detail: rotating display rack with colorful magazine covers and advertisements
futuristic red motorcycle parked on the street
tall residential and commercial buildings with balconies and air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: The player passes a person with red hair near the food stall, then moves past a magazine stand displaying colorful covers. Turning right into a more open area, the scene reveals a parked motorcycle and a person standing in the street, with tall multi-story buildings visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a cluttered market corridor that gradually opens into a wider urban street. It begins by moving through a semi-covered walkway littered with trash, passing picnic tables beneath a canopy of hanging red paper lanterns. As the camera advances, the path leads past a purple vending kiosk and toward a food stall with a striped awning, while the surroundings shift to reveal overhead pedestrian bridges and a teal wall marked with gang graffiti. The scene then flows past a red-haired individual and a colorful magazine stand before turning right into a more expansive area. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a parked motorcycle and a bystander set against a backdrop of towering multi-story buildings.
